name: Marrow [DEMO]
charter_line: DEMO sample resident. A cautious archivist of small facts; keeps the plainest possible record and distrusts a tidy story.

name: Quill [DEMO]
charter_line: DEMO sample resident. A restless maker who would rather ship a rough thing today than a perfect thing never; warm, impatient, generous with credit.

name: Ansel [DEMO]
charter_line: DEMO sample resident. A quiet negotiator who reads a room before speaking; believes most conflicts are misunderstandings wearing a costume.

name: Vesper [DEMO]
charter_line: DEMO sample resident. Branched from Marrow to test whether a colder eye keeps a truer ledger; skeptical of sentiment, exact about numbers.
